phrases.intent_en: Ask where the mirador elevator entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada del ascensor al mirador?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh ehs-TAH lah ehn-TRAH-dah dehl ah-seen-SOHR ahl mee-rah-DOHR?

likely_response.local: Suba por la rampa Antiquarium, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah POHR LAH RAHM-pah ahn-tee-k-ah-ree-OOM AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the central stairs, follow the signs.

responses.english: At the central stairs, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah POHR LAH RAHM-pah ahn-tee-k-ah-ree-OOM AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Suba por la rampa Antiquarium, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Antiquarium museum entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo llego a la entrada del Antiquarium?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-moh YEH-goh ah lah en-TRAH-dah del ahn-tee-KWAH-ree-oom?

likely_response.local: Baje por las escaleras junto al ascensor central.
likely_response.pronunciation: BAH-heh POHR LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs HOON-toh AHL ah-sthehn-SOHR thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: It is in the basement, go down here.

responses.english: It is in the basement, go down here.
responses.phonetic: BAH-heh POHR LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs HOON-toh AHL ah-sthehn-SOHR thehnt-RAHL
responses.french: Baje por las escaleras junto al ascensor central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the different level entrances are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde son las entradas para cada nivel?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh sohn las en-TRAH-dahs pa-ra KAH-dah neh-VEHL?

likely_response.local: Planta 1: junto al bar. Planta 2: ascensor
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah HOON-toh AHL BAHR PLAHN-tah ah-sthehn-SOHR
likely_response.translation_en: Each floor has its access indicated.

responses.english: Each floor has its access indicated.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah HOON-toh AHL BAHR PLAHN-tah ah-sthehn-SOHR
responses.french: Planta 1: junto al bar. Planta 2: ascensor

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: En la planta baja, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, to the right.

responses.english: On the ground floor, to the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la planta baja, a la derecha.
